summary: IBA Refrigeration Portfolio Analysis testing complete. All 31 backend tests passed (100%). All 17 frontend UI tests passed. The deterministic IBA pipeline correctly returns fleet data (400 units, 8 sites, 30 days), state distribution, benchmarks, opportunities, site ranking, RAMP connection, and trust signal. Role-based access works correctly: portfolio user sees IBA, operator does not, admin sees operator view.
critical_code_review_comments: IBA pipeline is fully deterministic - same output on every call (cached result)
Fleet has exactly 400 units across 8 sites with 30-day analysis window
State distribution is realistic: stable 54.5%, drift 20.2%, idle 9.2%, cycling 9.8%, degraded 6.2%
Benchmarks correctly validate P25 < P50 < P75 for all metrics
Top opportunity is Energy Drift Recovery ($47k/mo, 81 assets)
Site ranking has Warehouse Distribution Center at #1 with ramp_live=true
RAMP connection shows active CRITICAL priority for Cold Storage Compressor
Verified outcome shows VFD Coolant Pump with +1.3 kWh saved
Trust signal text 'Based on measured operating behaviour (no AI inference)' is visible
Role-based access: portfolio sees IBA, operator gets 403, admin can access but sees operator view in UI
seed_data_creation: Demo seed endpoints /api/system/demo/first-five-minutes and /api/system/demo/seed-portfolio create multi-site data with RAMP priorities and verified outcomes
context_for_next_testing_agent: IBA Refrigeration Portfolio Analysis fully working. All 17 features verified: (1) IBA API returns fleet data (400 units, 8 sites, 30 days), (2) Analysis is deterministic, (3) State distribution is realistic, (4) Benchmarks validate P25<P50<P75, (5) Top opportunity is Energy Drift Recovery, (6) Warehouse #1 with ramp_live=true, (7) RAMP connection shows CRITICAL Cold Storage Compressor, (8) Verified VFD Coolant Pump outcome, (9) Portfolio sees $91k/30-day and $1.1M annualized, (10) Fleet State Distribution color bar with legend, (11) Top Opportunities ranked by monthly impact, (12) Analysis→Live Detection connector with CRITICAL badge, (13) Sites Ranked by Opportunity with badges, (14) Site drill-down shows inline RAMP priorities, (15) Fleet Benchmarks with P25/P50/P75, (16) Trust signal visible, (17) Operator/Admin modes show no IBA data.

iba_deterministic.details: Same output on every call - fleet, state_distribution, benchmarks, opportunities, site_ranking all identical

benchmarks_p25_p50_p75.details: Energy Intensity, Runtime Ratio, Cycle Frequency all have P25 < P50 < P75

top_opportunity.details: Energy Drift Recovery at #1 with $47k/mo, 81 assets

warehouse_rank_1.details: Warehouse Distribution Center at #1 with ramp_live=true, Top Opportunity badge

ramp_connection_critical.details: Active detection shows Cold Storage Compressor CRITICAL with $340/day at risk

verified_outcome.details: VFD Coolant Pump with +1.3 kWh saved, Riverside Plant - Building A

fleet_state_distribution_ui.details: Color bar with percentages and legend showing all 5 states

top_opportunities_ui.details: 4 opportunities ranked by monthly impact with descriptions

analysis_live_detection_connector.details: Shows CRITICAL badge, Cold Storage Compressor, VFD Coolant Pump verified outcome

sites_ranked_by_opportunity.details: 8 sites with Warehouse #1, Top Opportunity and RAMP Live badges

site_drilldown.details: Clicking Warehouse shows Cold Storage Compressor CRITICAL, Rooftop Unit 1 MEDIUM

fleet_benchmarks_ui.details: Energy Intensity, Runtime Ratio, Cycle Frequency with P25/P50/P75 bars

trust_signal.details: 'Based on measured operating behaviour (no AI inference)' visible

operator_no_iba.details: Operator sees standard priorities view, no Portfolio Analysis section

admin_operator_view.details: Admin sees operator view (not portfolio) since has both HOW and WHERE lenses
